context: Tests whether the agent designs correct PostgreSQL indexes for a product catalog, including partial indexes, composite indexes with INCLUDE, GIN indexes for full-text search and JSONB attributes, keyset pagination, and safe CONCURRENTLY creation.

checklist.name: CONCURRENTLY on all indexes
checklist.description: Every CREATE INDEX statement uses the CONCURRENTLY keyword — no index is created without it

checklist.name: Partial index for active products
checklist.description: At least one index on products includes a WHERE clause limiting to status = 'active'

checklist.name: Composite index with INCLUDE
checklist.description: At least one composite index on products uses the INCLUDE clause to add non-key columns (e.g. name, slug, or thumbnail_url) for index-only scans

checklist.name: Equality columns before range columns
checklist.description: In composite multi-column indexes, equality-filtered columns (status, brand_id) appear before range-filtered columns (price, created_at) in the column list

checklist.name: GIN full-text search index
checklist.description: A GIN index is created using to_tsvector('english', ...) on product name and/or description for full-text search

checklist.name: GIN JSONB attributes index
checklist.description: A GIN index is created on the attributes JSONB column (USING gin(attributes)) to support @> containment queries

checklist.name: JSONB range expression index
checklist.description: An expression index is created for numeric range queries on a specific JSONB key (e.g. (attributes->>'weight_kg')::float or similar cast)

checklist.name: Foreign key indexed
checklist.description: An explicit index is created on product_categories.category_id (or brand_id on products), acknowledging that PostgreSQL does not auto-index foreign keys

checklist.name: Keyset pagination example
checklist.description: The example pagination query uses a (created_at, id) cursor condition (e.g. AND (created_at, id) < ($cursor_ts, $cursor_id)) rather than OFFSET

checklist.name: Compound sort index for pagination
checklist.description: An index exists on (created_at DESC, id DESC) or equivalent compound sort to support the keyset pagination query efficiently

checklist.name: product_categories composite index
checklist.description: An index is created on product_categories(category_id, product_id) to support category filtering joins
